input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
# Find NFL Wild Card Sunday and Monday results
with open('articles/2026/01/12/articles.jsonl') as f:
    for line in f:
        a = json.loads(line)
        title = a.get('title','') or ''
        for kw in ['49ers', 'Eagles', 'Patriots', 'Chargers', 'Steelers', 'Texans', 'Divisional', 'playoff']:
            if kw in title and ('NFL' in title or 'beat' in title.lower() or 'win' in title.lower() or 'playoff' in title.lower() or 'Wild Card' in title):
                print(title[:140])
                break
" | head -20
